name: Hungering Darkness
title: Beneath the Bets

abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: Incorporeal
abilities.text: Reduce damage dealt to this model by 1. Damage from (t) actions may not be reduced this way.

abilities.name: Terrifying
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model suffer a (-) to their duel.

triggers.name: Sharpened Brilliance
triggers.text: Discard a friendly Brilliance token from either this model or the target. When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Drain Magic
triggers.text: Target discards a card. This model may draw a card and then discard a card.

actions.name: Bound to Brilliance
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models. Target must have a friendly Brilliance token. Target declares an action, chosen and controlled by this model. After resolving the generated action, remove a Brilliance token from the target.

triggers.name: The Light Inside
triggers.text: This model or the target gains a Brilliance token.

triggers.name: Feed the Darkness
triggers.text: After failing, remove a friendly Brilliance token from the target. This model heals 2.

extraction_notes: Bound to Brilliance has 'Wp' resist in the stat line, but is categorized as a Tactical Action. This is treated as action_type: null per rules, though the action has targeting and resist mechanics.
